creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
Created attachment 148736
mkfifo trigger fix, pkg-message extension and sample changings

Thanks for this great port! I tried it on 10.1 and wondered that nullmailer just didn't work. Reason was, that the fifo "trigger" wasn't present. As newbie to nullmailer it wasn't clear to me why/what was the problem, so I think the port needs to be fixed.

I prepared a patchset which does fix the fifo issue, plus extends the pkg-message for hints about periodic.conf and sednmail-submission disabling in rc.conf.

Additionally I'd like to see the "me" resp "me.sample" be more usable. Therefor I changed to @sample in pkg-plist and modified pkg-install. I don't know why PKGINSTALL and PKGMESSAGE were redifend in the port's Makefile (and PKGDEINSTALL not), leaving them to default ${PKGDIR}/PKG* just should be fine accourding to porters handbook, so I removed them.

I tested 'make install' 'make deinstall' 'make package && pkg add `make -VPKGFILE`' and 'pkg delete'. Works like expected here on 10.1.
